message:
feat(vc_web): add collector status and alert rules endpoints

**New Endpoints:**

GET /api/machines/:id/collectors
- Returns collector status for a specific machine
- Includes collector_name, last_run, status, row_count
- Supports pagination (limit/offset)

GET /api/alerts/rules
- Returns configured alert rules
- Includes rule_id, condition, severity, enabled
- Supports pagination (limit/offset)

These endpoints enable the TUI and external tools to inspect
collector health and alert configuration per-machine.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
